steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The phrase "fellow OECD member Costa Rica" treats the country name as a restrictive appositive — it specifies which member nation is meant, so it must not be set off by punctuation.

steps.title: Match to choices
steps.content: Only the choice with no punctuation between "nation" and "Costa Rica" is correct. That matches choice B — B is correct.
